text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.TeachingStep t
JOIN dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a1 ON a1.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub1 ON sub1.accountInfoID = a1.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd1 ON a1.ID = atd1.AccountId

INNER JOIN dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = cc.LearningProcessAttributesId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cc.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a2 ON cp.accountInfoId = a2.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub2 ON sub2.accountInfoID = a2.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd2 ON a2.ID = atd2.AccountId

WHERE 
    (
        (
            a1.ID IS NOT NULL AND atd1.AccountId IS NOT NULL AND
            (
                sub1.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    sub1.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a1.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND sub1.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND sub1.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
        OR
        (
            a2.ID IS NOT NULL AND atd2.AccountId IS NOT NULL AND
            (
                sub2.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    sub2.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a2.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND sub2.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND sub2.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );
